Function.Inference: Main theme starts in 4/4 and ends with a 3/4 transitional phrase.
Key changes to Gb major; motif develops extensively over 16 bars.
A 4-bar ascending bridge in 3/4 returning to C major.
Return of the main theme structure (4 bars in 4/4, 4 in 3/4).
Introduces a soaring new melody with triplets in high register.
Syncopated final section that naturally leads back to the loop.

Section.Inference: Theme A establishes the main melodic motif.
Contrasting development section in Gb major.
Bridge building tension to return to the home key.
Restatement of Theme A in C major.
Theme C, featuring completely new contrasting melodic material.
Theme D, a distinct 8-bar idea closing the loop cycle.
